issues.problem: Section headlines (such as 'Seamless Clincove DB Integration', 'Durable OTP Resilience', etc.) are rendered in a sans-serif typeface, which violates the brand style guide requirement: 'Headlines: high-contrast serif (Georgia or similar system serif)'.
issues.fix: Change the font family of all section headlines to the brand's serif typeface (Georgia or system serif) to align with the style guide and provide better high-contrast editorial character.

notes: The color scheme, margins, imagery, and layout structure align beautifully with the Strangeloop Coffee brand guidelines. Correcting the headline typography to the designated serif font will complete the brand adherence.
